rules.rule_text:
title: Symlink Etc Passwd
id: c67fc22a-0be5-4b4f-aad5-2b32c4b69523
status: test
description: Detects suspicious command lines that look as if they would create symbolic
  links to /etc/passwd
references:
- https://www.qualys.com/2021/05/04/21nails/21nails.txt
author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
date: 2019-04-05
modified: 2021-11-27
tags:
- attack.t1204.001
- attack.execution
logsource:
  product: linux
detection:
  keywords:
  - ln -s -f /etc/passwd
  - ln -s /etc/passwd
  condition: keywords
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: high
